title: Back To The Future: Review Of Our Semis Work
text: We end the July quarter having written about 20 of our favorite semiconductor names, and this article studies how our ratings played out. We got a lot of backlash on our bearish stance on, NVDA, AMD, WDC, and MU, among others, but the stocks did drop, consistent with our belief.

title: 10 Top Stocks to Buy in a Bear Market
Micron and Western Digital Stocks Are Downgraded on Market Weakness
text: Analysts at Mizuho downgraded shares of Micron Technology and Western Digital as prices of storage chips and devices decline at a steeper pace and key server markets appear weak.

title: Western Digital Stock Hits 2-Year Low on Bear Notes
text: Western Digital Corp (NASDAQ:WDC) stock is down 4.2% at $35.06 at last glance, after Deutsche Bank downgraded the stock to "hold" from "buy," with a price-target cut to $40 from $56.

title: Why Western Digital Is Down 13.8% This Week
text: The CEO gave a dour pre-announcement for the September quarter, and recession fears didn't help, either.

title: Why Has Western Digital Stock Underperformed The S&P Since 2017?
text: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) stock price dropped around 45% from $80 in 2017 end to around $43 currently, primarily due to unfavorable changes in its P/S multiple.

title: 3 Potential Value Opportunities
text: When seeking value opportunities, investors could be interested in the following stocks since their prices are trading at a discount to the intrinsic value calculated by GuruFocus' earnings-based discounted cash flow calculator.

title: Western Digital (WDC) Stock: Why It Fell 2.54%
text: The stock price of Western Digital (WDC) fell by 2.54% in the most recent trading session. This is why.
